title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter has launched Fusion API, a compound model system that sends prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to select or synthesize the final answer. The creator tested it against claims of matching Fable-level performance and found inconsistent real-world results, with Fusion sometimes slower, more expensive, and worse than using a single strong model.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model system that routes a prompt to a panel of models and then uses a judge model to synthesize their outputs into a final response. OpenRouter claims Fable-level performance at lower cost, citing DRACO Bench results. Real-world testing in the video contradicts that framing: performance is inconsistent, and latency and cost sometimes exceed those of a single strong model. The takeaway is that the ensemble-and-judge routing approach does not reliably beat picking one capable model.
